/* packet1_code_minimum */
/* src=YO0FLP dst=W0RLDT */
static const uint8_t packet1_code_minimum_frame[] = { 0x00, 0x01, 0xDD, 0x0C, 0xAC, 0x93, 0x40, 0x03, 0xF0, 0x54, 0x45, 0x53, 0x54, 0x20, 0x54, 0x45, 0x53, 0x54, 0x20, 0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x4F, 0x0E };

static const bool packet1_code_minimum_start_level = false;
